Class MovieAPI

java.lang.Object
MovieAPI
public class MovieAPI extends Object
API client for OMDb movie database. Provides methods to search and fetch movie data.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String[]
    getGenres()
     
    static void
    main(String[] args)
     
    static String[]
    parseMovieData(String json)
    Parses the raw JSON response from the OMDb API for a single movie search and extracts relevant movie data such as title, genre, duration, plot, and IMDb ID.
    static void
    searchAndAddMovie(MovieCRUD crud, String movieTitle)
    Searches for a movie by title using the OMDb API, parses the movie data, and inserts it into the database using the provided MovieCRUD instance.
    static String[]
    searchByGenre(String genre)
    Searches for movies by genre using the OMDb API and returns an array of movie titles that match the specified genre.
    static String[]
    searchByGenrePages(String genre, int pages)
     
    static String
    searchMovieJSON(String query)
    Searches for a movie by title using the OMDb API and returns the raw JSON response as a string.
    static String
    searchMoviesByGenreJSON(String genre, int page)
    Searches for movies by genre using the OMDb API and returns the raw JSON response as a string.

  • Constructor Details

    • MovieAPI

      public MovieAPI()

  • Method Details

    • getGenres

      public static String[] getGenres()

    • searchMovieJSON

      public static String searchMovieJSON(String query)
      Searches for a movie by title using the OMDb API and returns the raw JSON response as a string.
      Parameters:
      query -
      Returns:
      The raw JSON response from the OMDb API for the given movie title query, or null if an error occurs.

    • searchMoviesByGenreJSON

      public static String searchMoviesByGenreJSON(String genre, int page)
      Searches for movies by genre using the OMDb API and returns the raw JSON response as a string.
      Parameters:
      genre - The genre to search for (e.g., "Action", "Comedy", etc.)
      page - The page number for paginated results (OMDb API returns 10 results per page)
      Returns:
      The raw JSON response from the OMDb API for the given genre search query, or null if an error occurs.

    • parseMovieData

      public static String[] parseMovieData(String json)
      Parses the raw JSON response from the OMDb API for a single movie search and extracts relevant movie data such as title, genre, duration, plot, and IMDb ID.
      Parameters:
      json - The raw JSON response from the OMDb API for a single movie search query.
      Returns:
      An array of strings containing the parsed movie data in the order: [imdbId, title, genre, duration, plot], or null if parsing fails.

    • searchByGenre

      public static String[] searchByGenre(String genre)
      Searches for movies by genre using the OMDb API and returns an array of movie titles that match the specified genre.
      Parameters:
      genre - The genre to search for (e.g., "Action", "Comedy", etc.)
      Returns:
      An array of movie titles that match the specified genre, or null if no movies are found or an error occurs.

    • searchByGenrePages

      public static String[] searchByGenrePages(String genre, int pages)

    • searchAndAddMovie

      public static void searchAndAddMovie(MovieCRUD crud, String movieTitle)
      Searches for a movie by title using the OMDb API, parses the movie data, and inserts it into the database using the provided MovieCRUD instance.
      Parameters:
      crud - An instance of MovieCRUD that provides the method for inserting movies into the database.
      movieTitle - The title of the movie to search for and add to the database.

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
